genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 17 August 2017

species.citation: (Blume) Hook.f. & Thomson , Fl. Ind. (Hooker f. & Thomson) 1 (1855) 166 ; Philipson, Blumea 30 (1985) 406; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 298; ≡ Brongniartia coriacea Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1825) 435. = Kibara clemensiae Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 423 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 184. = Kibara cuspidata Blume , Mus. Bot. 2 (1856) 89 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185. = Kibara grandifolia Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 29 (1905) 15 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185. = Kibara merrilliana Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 424 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185. = Kibara stapfiana Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 424 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185. = Kibara vidalii Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 423 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185. = Matthaea ellipsoidea Merr. ex Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 423 ; Pflanzenreich 49 (1911) 19; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 186.
species.distribution: Malesia. BALABAC, CATANDUANES, CEBU (photos), DALUPIRI, LUZON: Albay, Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines, Camarines Norte, Ilocos Norte (photos), Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Lanao, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY, SAMAR, TAWI-TAWI.

species.citation: Blume , Mus. Bot. 2 (1856) 89 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185; Philipson, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 300.
species.distribution: Borneo, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Benguet.
species.notes: Thickets about limestone boulders and ledges. 0-1200m.

species.citation: Perkins , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 45 (1911) 424 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 185.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet.
species.notes: Thickets or forests at medium elevation. Very close to Kibara cuspidata Blume (= Kibara coriacea (Blume) Tul).

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 13 April 2024
